{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Tutorial 20 - extract_ocv_dva_ica"
   ],
   "id": "cd6ce2c14f980f85"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Step 0: Setup the project and prepare the data"
   ],
   "id": "102dff6ed840c830"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:47.514681700Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:47.505928400Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import pydpeet as eet"
   ],
   "id": "79e029b8403acba3",
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 7
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "We will use \"ERROR\" as the logging style for better readability of the notebook"
   ],
   "id": "7464f69370048fea"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:47.550715500Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:47.515699300Z"
    }
   },
   "source": "eet.set_logging_style(\"ERROR\")",
   "id": "913f64d76d31c3ec",
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 8
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:51.707594400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:47.553735Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "standardized_data = eet.read(\n",
    "    input_path=str(Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"res\" / \"raw_data_from_cyclers\" / \"Cal_Ageing_Checkup1.xlsx\"),\n",
    "    config=eet.ReadConfig.Neware_8_0_0_516,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "id": "dca5318f3a5d9058",
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": 9
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Step 1: extract_ocv_dva_ica"
   ],
   "id": "307081f795f22896"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:54.521864300Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:51.718296Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "dva_ica_data = eet.extract_ocv_dva_ica(\n",
    "    df=standardized_data,\n",
    "    soc_c_ref=4.75,\n",
    "    visualize=True,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "id": "8ce09a2468014d4c",
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1400x600 with 2 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     }
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 10
  },
  {
   "metadata": {},
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "source": [
    "<div class=\"alert alert-block alert-warning\">\n",
    "<b>Warning:</b> The first value of the derivative is NaN, because of the numeric differentiation.\n",
    "</div>"
   ],
   "id": "9ec92f043b0ee392"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:54.551135400Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:54.523436800Z"
    }
   },
   "source": "dva_ica_data[[\"dV_dQ\", \"dQ_dV\"]].head(6)",

   ],
   "execution_count": 11
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Step 2: With Savitzky-Golay smoothing"
   ],
   "id": "a1b2c3d4e5f6g7h8"
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {
    "ExecuteTime": {
     "end_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:57.232408300Z",
     "start_time": "2026-06-18T12:20:54.561047500Z"
    }
   },
   "source": [
    "dva_ica_data_sg = eet.extract_ocv_dva_ica(\n",
    "    df=standardized_data,\n",
    "    soc_c_ref=4.75,\n",
    "    savgol=True,\n",
    "    visualize=True,\n",
    ")"
   ],
   "id": "b2c3d4e5f6a7b8c9",
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1400x600 with 2 Axes>"
      ],
      "image/png": ""
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data",
     "jetTransient": {
      "display_id": null
     }
    }
   ],
   "execution_count": 12
  },
